description:
Overview:

1. This kind of face ice cube mold helps to reduce the eye bags,fine lines and blood,also,to reduce the swelling of skin and cool the air,massaging your face and making your makeup easier.
2. This face massage mold bears a temperature of -40-250℃,suitable for oven,freezer and dishwasher,not easy to be damaged.
3. This moisturizing and non-stick icing mold is washable,serving you for long-term use because it is soft and elastic.
4. Compact and lightweight,this face massager is easy to store and carry,you can place it in your bag without worrying about taking up so much space.
5. Easy operation: You just need to add water to the mold and place it in the freezer,waiting for several hours,you will get a good ice cube to massage your skin.


Product information:
Category makeup tools: Body Care Appliances, facial beauty makeup tools
Color classification: Pink 1, Green 1, yellow 1, purple 1, Red 1
Material: Silicone


Packing list:
Silicone Ice Roller*1
